column6:
INSTRUCTIONS FROM LAURIE

Migrate to Dual tech cards with same data on both sides
Use Corporate 1000 format - 35 bits with FC = 313
Start Dual Tech cards at badge ID 400,001
Prox Filter 35 bit format with badge ID >400,000

For the reader we want to ship Tony an updated config file with the prox filter so he can also test his OSDP download capability. Please notify me when samples are shipped.
